params.description: Small picture graph appears on left side of screen. Scale of 5. Not interactive — iconic display only.
Small equal groups visual appears on right side of screen. 4 bags with 5 items each. Not interactive — iconic display only.

beats.text: Here's something to think about. Today's work connects to something you've been doing for a while. Did you notice a connection?
Did you notice a connection between graphs and equal groups?
options: Yes — reading graph scales was like finding equal groups
Kind of — some parts felt similar
Not really — this felt brand new

condition.selected: Yes — reading graph scales was like finding equal groups

beats.text: You spotted it. Every time you read a scale of 5 graph, you were counting groups of 5. Graph scales were equal groups the whole time.

condition.selected: Kind of — some parts felt similar

beats.text: Good noticing. The counting by 5s and counting by 2s from graphs — that was groups all along. The connection gets clearer over time.

condition.selected: Not really — this felt brand new

beats.text: That makes sense — the multiplication symbol and equal groups are new. But remember the Warmup graph? Those symbols were holding groups inside. You'll see more connections as we keep going.

elements.description: Small picture graph on left side. Scale of 5. Iconic display.
Small equal groups visual on right side. 4 bags with 5 items each. Iconic display.
